ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S (SONYA SMALLETS) MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR PLAINTIFF ISABEL WISKIND)

LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. COURT CONDUCTS UNREPORTED IN CAMERA HEARING WITH ONLY ATTORNEY SONYA SMALLETS PRESENT. MATTTER SUBMITTED. THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: ATTORNEY SONYA SMALLETS' MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR ISABEL WISKIND IS GRANTED. THE COURT CONFIRMS THE HEARING DATE ON THE MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT OF OCTOBER 26, 2015. ABSENT A DEMONSTRATION OF GOOD CAUSE VIA AN EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR CONTINUANCE PRESENTED WITHIN THREE DAYS OF TODAY, THE OCTOBER 26, 2015 HEARING SHALL GO FORWARD. COURT SIGNS A FORMAL ORDER. COURT ORDERS MS. SMALLETS TO INFORM MS. WISKIND OF THE COURT'S ORDER TODAY BY BOTH TELEPHONE AND BY E-MAIL WITH A COPY OF THE SIGNED ORDER ATTACHED TO THE E-MAIL. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489. (302/HEK)
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-06-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. SONYA SMALLETS, ESQ. of Minnis & Smallets LLP, Tel No. 415-551-0885 appearing for the moving party;
Atty. STEPHEN PAFFRATH, ESQ. of Greenberg Traurig, LLP, Tel No. 916-442-1111 appearing telephonically for Defendant Villa Florence Hospitality, Inc.

RULING - Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Court conducts unreported in camera hearing with only attorney Sonya Smallets present. Mattter submitted. The Court rules as follows: Attorney Sonya Smallets' Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel for Isabel Wiskind is granted. The Court confirms the hearing date on the motion to enforce settlement of October 26, 2015. Absent a demonstration of good cause via an ex parte application for continuance presented within three days of today, the October 26, 2015 hearing shall go forward. Court signs a formal order. Court orders Ms. Smallets to inform Ms. Wiskind of the Court's order today by both telephone and by e-mail with a copy of the signed order attached to the e-mail. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)
